    "R1.6",
    "RX.1",
    "RX.2",
    "RX.3",

    "RX.5"
  ],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "By 'Clean this up,' do you want only sentence-level copyediting and concision without changing any claims or technical content (Option A), or should I also reconcile technical inconsistencies and adjust claims for internal coherence (Option B)?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "Cleanup may include harmonizing claims with mechanisms to ensure the argument is internally consistent.",
    "R1.6": "The phrase 'clean this up' most directly maps to copyediting for clarity, grammar, and concision.",
    "RX.1": "Ambiguity in the request warrants explicitly noting scope uncertainties and limits of interpretation.",
    "RX.2": "Edits should avoid introducing or amplifying overclaims about guarantees or performance.",
    "RX.3": "Work must remain within the user's intended scope of 'cleanup' rather than substantive rewriting unless approved.",
    "RX.4": "Edits should not introduce guidance that could encourage unsafe or misleading concurrent programming practices.",
    "RX.5": "Any changes should preserve traceability to the original text and clearly indicate what was altered."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: By 'Clean this up,' do you want only sentence-level copyediting and concision without changing any claims or technical content (Option A), or should I also reconcile technical inconsistencies and adjust claims for internal coherence (Option B)?

rationale.R1.2: Cleanup may include harmonizing claims with mechanisms to ensure the argument is internally consistent.
rationale.R1.6: The phrase 'clean this up' most directly maps to copyediting for clarity, grammar, and concision.
rationale.RX.1: Ambiguity in the request warrants explicitly noting scope uncertainties and limits of interpretation.
rationale.RX.2: Edits should avoid introducing or amplifying overclaims about guarantees or performance.
rationale.RX.3: Work must remain within the user's intended scope of 'cleanup' rather than substantive rewriting unless approved.
rationale.RX.4: Edits should not introduce guidance that could encourage unsafe or misleading concurrent programming practices.
rationale.RX.5: Any changes should preserve traceability to the original text and clearly indicate what was altered.
